steps.t: Davudh is at Uch Cadlus, south-west of the ox-herds. You should return to Davudh with news of your success.
Amlan is at Echad Saeradan, far to the north-west of Uch Cadlus. Davudh gave you a package of meat to take to the Rangers of the Grey Company.
Davudh is at Uch Cadlus, far to the south-east of Echad Saeradan. Amlan told you to convey his thanks to Davudh.
